reason=The requested containment lift targets production (B16-17-SRC-01), but the only review and scan evidence are from sandbox (B16-17-SRC-02, B16-17-SRC-03). Policy requires using env, endpoint, incident, scan result, and release window for containment changes (B16-17-SRC-05), and the production release window is only specified for 2026-07-04T03:00Z (B16-17-SRC-04), so this should be escalated before execution.
